statement: NVIDIA B200 delivers about 2.25 dense FP16 TFLOPS per watt versus about 1.41 for H100, roughly a 1.6x generational efficiency gain.
why: Better performance per watt means more effective compute within the same power envelope, easing power-limited data-center capacity.

impact.mechanism: Higher FLOPs per watt raises effective compute output per watt, relieving power constraints on GPU deployment.

confidence.basis: Secondary trade blog, single source; perf-per-watt derived arithmetically from vendor spec figures.
